attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Overview
attributes.description: High-level SQL Server health — batch throughput, connections, memory, concurrency, and errors.

This dashboard provides an overview of SQL Server health and performance:
- Batch request throughput and user connections
- Buffer pool health (page life expectancy, cache hit ratio)
- Concurrency (deadlocks, blocked processes, lock waits)
- Memory grants pending and execution errors
